meanings.definition: examine so as to determine accuracy, quality, or condition
announce one's departure from a hotel
be verified or confirmed; pass inspection

examples: We are running down a few tips

meanings.definition: record, add up, and receive payment for items purchased
examples: She was checking out the apples that the customer had put on the conveyer belt

meanings.definition: withdraw money by writing a check
try to learn someone's opinions and intentions
examples: I have to sound out the new professor
